name: Jane Smith
summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable distributed systems and leading cross-functional teams. Specialized in cloud infrastructure, microservices architecture, and DevOps practices.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led migration of monolithic application to microservices architecture, reducing deployment time by 75% and improving system reliability to 99.99% uptime
Architected and implemented real-time data pipeline processing 10M+ events daily using Apache Kafka and Kubernetes
Mentored team of 5 junior engineers, establishing code review practices and technical design review process
Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by 40% through optimization of resource allocation and implementation of auto-scaling policies

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built RESTful APIs serving 500K+ daily active users with sub-100ms response times
Implemented comprehensive CI/CD pipeline using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment failures by 60%
Designed and deployed monitoring infrastructure with Prometheus and Grafana, improving incident response time by 3x
Collaborated with product team to deliver 15+ major features ahead of schedule

experience.title: Junior Software Developer
bullets: Developed full-stack web applications using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Participated in agile development process with 2-week sprint cycles
Wrote comprehensive unit and integration tests achieving 85%+ code coverage
Maintained legacy PHP applications while gradually modernizing codebase

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.details: Magna Cum Laude, GPA: 3.8/4.0. Dean's List all semesters.

projects.title: Open Source Monitoring Dashboard
bullets: Built customizable monitoring dashboard with real-time metrics visualization using React and D3.js
Implemented plugin system allowing community contributions for new data sources
Gained 2,500+ GitHub stars and active community of 50+ contributors

projects.title: Distributed Task Queue
bullets: Developed high-performance task queue system in Go with Redis backend
Supported 10,000+ tasks per second with guaranteed delivery and retry mechanisms
Won 1st place at TechConf 2022 Hackathon among 150+ participants
